messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill:





Now I'll analyze the uploaded document. The file is titled **"LZ Phone Call 12.16.2020 _Redacted.pdf"** — this is a clinical phone call note/consultation record. I will apply the BloomCell report-analyzer framework to generate the 8 structured objects and proceed to store them.

Based on the document content (a clinical phone call note dated 12/16/2020), here are the 8 structured analysis objects generated per the BloomCell framework. Now I'll store each one in Cosmos DB:

---

**Storing Record 1 of 8 — Group 1 Highlight**✅ Record 1 saved. Storing Record 2 of 8 — Group 1 Note:✅ Record 2 saved. Storing Record 3 of 8 — Group 2 Highlight:✅ Record 3 saved. Storing Record 4 of 8 — Group 2 Note:✅ Record 4 saved. Storing Record 5 of 8 — Group 3 Highlight:✅ Record 5 saved. Storing Record 6 of 8 — Group 3 Note:✅ Record 6 saved. Storing Record 7 of 8 — Group 4 Highlight:✅ Record 7 saved. Storing Record 8 of 8 — Group 4 Note:8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to **Step 6** — updating the original PatientDocument in Cosmos DB:

Document updated successfully.
